templates.title: Epic Game Trailer Cinematic Sequence
templates.description: AAA game trailer with cinematic camera work, dramatic character reveals, and explosive action sequences

prompt.main: Cinematic game trailer opening with extreme close-up of warrior's eye reflecting battlefield. Camera pulls back through shattered helmet visor revealing massive fantasy war scene. Sweeping crane shot over clashing armies with particle effects, magic spells, and dynamic combat. Hero character charges forward as camera tracks alongside, capturing sword strikes with motion blur. Dramatic slow-motion moment as dragon swoops overhead casting shadows. UI elements fade in showing game logo with epic orchestral crescendo.

elements.cameraMovement: Pull-back reveal, sweeping crane shots, dynamic tracking, slow-motion transitions
elements.subject: Armored warrior hero, fantasy armies, dragon, magical effects
elements.scene: Epic battlefield, destroyed castle, burning landscape, storm clouds
elements.motion: Combat choreography, spell casting, dragon flight, particle explosions
elements.lighting: Dramatic rim lighting, fire glow, lightning flashes, volumetric fog
elements.atmosphere: Epic, heroic, intense, cinematic blockbuster quality
elements.style: AAA game trailer cinematics - Blizzard/Epic Games quality

modifiedElements.scene: Futuristic battlefield with spaceships and laser weapons
modifiedElements.subject: Space marine with powered armor and energy weapons

bestPractices: Build tension with music and pacing
Mix wide establishing shots with intense close-ups
Showcase unique game mechanics and features
End with strong logo reveal and call-to-action

examples.sampleOutput: World of Warcraft, God of War, Elden Ring trailers

templates.title: Virtual Environment Walkthrough Tour
templates.description: Immersive exploration of game environments showcasing level design, atmosphere, and interactive elements

prompt.main: First-person perspective gliding through mystical forest environment at dawn. Camera smoothly navigates winding paths, revealing bioluminescent plants pulsing with light. Transitions through ancient stone archway into hidden underground temple. Dynamic lighting shifts from natural sunbeams to torch-lit corridors. Interactive elements highlight as camera passes - glowing runes, moving platforms, hidden passages. Ambient wildlife and particle effects create living world. Seamless transitions between diverse biomes showcasing environmental storytelling.

elements.cameraMovement: Smooth first-person navigation, discovery reveals, environmental transitions
elements.subject: Game environment, interactive objects, ambient creatures, architectural details
elements.scene: Mystical forest to ancient temple, multiple connected biomes
elements.motion: Floating particles, swaying foliage, water effects, ambient animations
elements.lighting: Dynamic time-of-day, bioluminescence, torchlight, magical glows

modifiedElements.scene: Neon-lit metropolis with flying vehicles and holograms
modifiedElements.lighting: Neon signs, holographic displays, rain reflections

bestPractices: Maintain smooth camera movement for comfort

examples.sampleOutput: Horizon Forbidden West environments, Cyberpunk 2077 city tours

templates.title: Character Abilities & Combat Showcase
templates.description: Dynamic presentation of character skills, combos, and special abilities with HUD elements

prompt.main: Arena setting with character in combat stance center frame. Camera orbits as character demonstrates combo sequence - punch, kick, special move with energy effects. Slow-motion captures impact frames with particle bursts. HUD elements appear showing combo counter, damage numbers, skill cooldowns. Character transforms/powers up with dramatic lighting change. Multiple ability demonstrations with dynamic camera angles - aerial attacks, ground pounds, projectile skills. UI overlay shows skill tree and upgrade paths. Finishing move with cinematic camera work.

elements.cameraMovement: Orbital showcase, dynamic combat angles, slow-motion impacts
elements.subject: Playable character, combat effects, enemy targets, ability visuals
elements.scene: Training arena, combat dojo, virtual simulation space
elements.motion: Martial arts combos, special moves, transformation sequences
elements.lighting: Ability-specific lighting, impact flashes, aura effects

modifiedElements.lighting: Magical auras, spell circles, elemental colors

bestPractices: Clear ability telegraphing and visual feedback
Show combo potential and skill synergies
Demonstrate both offensive and defensive abilities

examples.sampleOutput: Mortal Kombat character reveals, League of Legends champion spotlights

templates.title: Multiplayer Gameplay Highlight Reel
templates.description: Fast-paced montage of multiplayer moments, killstreaks, and team coordination with dynamic editing

prompt.main: Rapid montage of FPS gameplay highlights. Quick cuts between headshot sequences with hitmarker effects. Drone camera captures team coordination - synchronized breach with smoke grenades. First-person view of sliding into cover, quick-scope sniper elimination. Third-person spectator cam shows multi-kill explosion. Kill feed UI elements pop up with player names. Scoreboard flashes showing MVP status. Victory screen with team celebration emotes. Fast-paced editing synced to electronic music beats. Motion blur transitions between clips.

elements.cameraMovement: Quick cuts, whip pans, drone flyovers, mixed perspectives
elements.subject: Player characters, weapon effects, explosions, team formations
elements.scene: Various multiplayer maps - urban, desert, spaceship interiors
elements.motion: Running, sliding, jumping, shooting, explosions, victory dances
elements.lighting: Muzzle flashes, explosions, tactical equipment glows

modifiedElements.scene: Top-down MOBA map with lanes and jungle
modifiedElements.motion: Ability combos, team fights, objective captures

examples.sampleOutput: Call of Duty montages, Valorant highlight reels

templates.title: Esports Tournament Coverage & Hype
templates.description: Professional esports production with player reactions, crowd shots, and intense gameplay moments

prompt.main: Stadium establishing shot with thousands of fans, stage lights sweeping across crowd. Cut to player booth - extreme close-up of focused eyes reflecting game screen. Split-screen showing both teams' perspectives during crucial team fight. Overhead tactical view of strategic positioning. Player face cam shows intense concentration, fist pump after victory. Crowd eruption with confetti cannons. Trophy presentation with dramatic lighting. Slow-motion replay of game-winning play with commentary overlay. AR graphics showing player stats floating above stage.

elements.cameraMovement: Crane shots, booth cams, tactical overviews, crowd pans
elements.subject: Pro players, crowd reactions, game footage, trophy ceremony
elements.scene: Esports arena, player booths, main stage, crowd areas
elements.motion: Player reactions, crowd waves, confetti, light shows
elements.lighting: Stage lighting, spotlights, LED displays, pyrotechnics

modifiedElements.scene: Multiple player webcams in grid layout
modifiedElements.subject: Remote players in home setups

examples.sampleOutput: League of Legends Worlds, CS:GO Major coverage

templates.title: VR Experience Immersive Demonstration
templates.description: First-person VR gameplay showing hand tracking, environmental interaction, and presence

prompt.main: POV shot showing virtual hands reaching out, grabbing floating UI menu in 3D space. Smooth head tracking as player looks around fantastical VR environment. Hands interact with physics objects - picking up, throwing, manipulating tools. Teleportation movement with visual arc indicator. Close interaction with NPC showing facial tracking and eye contact. Gesture controls triggering magical effects from fingertips. Room-scale movement around virtual workspace. Mixed reality view showing player in real space within virtual world. Haptic feedback visualization on contact with objects.

elements.cameraMovement: Natural head tracking, smooth locomotion, teleportation jumps
elements.subject: Virtual hands, interactive objects, VR UI elements, NPCs
elements.scene: Fantastical VR environments, mixed reality spaces
elements.motion: Hand gestures, object manipulation, physics interactions
elements.lighting: Volumetric lighting, interactive light sources, particle effects

bestPractices: Avoid motion sickness with smooth movement
Show hand presence and tracking quality

examples.sampleOutput: Half-Life: Alyx gameplay, Beat Saber demonstrations

templates.title: Game Development Behind the Scenes
templates.description: Documentary-style footage showing game creation process, developer interviews, and work-in-progress

prompt.main: Developer at workstation with multiple monitors showing game engine, code, and 3D models. Timelapse of character model evolution from concept art to final render. Motion capture session with actors in suits performing combat choreography. Team meeting with whiteboard full of level designs and sticky notes. Close-up of artist painting textures on digital tablet. Programmer debugging code with gameplay footage on second monitor. Sound designer recording foley effects. Playtesting session with developers taking notes. Before/after comparison of early prototype vs polished gameplay.

elements.cameraMovement: Documentary style handheld, slider shots, timelapses
elements.subject: Game developers, workstations, development tools, prototypes
elements.scene: Game studio offices, mocap stages, recording booths, meeting rooms
elements.motion: Typing, drawing, mocap performances, collaborative discussions
elements.lighting: Natural office lighting, monitor glows, studio lights for mocap

modifiedElements.scene: Home office setup with single developer
modifiedElements.subject: Solo indie developer working on passion project

examples.sampleOutput: NoClip documentaries, God of War making-of videos

templates.title: Virtual Concert Metaverse Experience
templates.description: In-game concert event with virtual performers, crowd interactions, and spectacular visual effects

prompt.main: Aerial establishing shot of massive virtual concert venue filled with player avatars. Stage erupts with pyrotechnics as virtual artist appears in burst of particles. Dynamic camera flies through crowd showing diverse custom avatars dancing, emoting. Stage transforms with each song - floating platforms, gravity-defying set pieces. Synchronized light show with laser effects cutting through volumetric fog. Crowd participation moments - everyone's avatars light up simultaneously. Giant AR visuals appear above stage synced to music. Camera pulls back to show entire metaverse island transformed by concert effects.

elements.cameraMovement: Sweeping aerials, stage fly-throughs, crowd navigation, 360 spins
elements.subject: Virtual performer, avatar crowds, stage effects, environmental transforms
elements.scene: Metaverse concert venue, fantastical stage designs, virtual worlds
elements.motion: Dancing avatars, particle effects, stage transformations, synchronized emotes
elements.lighting: Concert lighting, lasers, pyrotechnics, synchronized color waves

modifiedElements.subject: Virtual DJ with turntables and mixing board
modifiedElements.lighting: Club lighting with strobes and LED walls

bestPractices: Sync visual effects to music beats

examples.sampleOutput: Travis Scott Fortnite concert, Lil Nas X Roblox show

templates.title: Metaverse Social Interaction Showcase
templates.description: Virtual world social experiences, avatar customization, and community interactions

prompt.main: Avatar creation screen with player customizing appearance - facial features morphing, outfit changes, accessories adding. Transition to social hub with diverse avatars congregating. Friends meeting up with greeting emotes and chat bubbles. Group walking to virtual cafe, sitting at table with proximity voice chat visualization. Quick cuts of various social activities - virtual shopping, mini-games, photo booth poses. Avatar apartment customization with furniture placement. Dance party scene with synchronized emotes. Virtual selfie with landmark in background. UI showing friend requests and social features.

elements.cameraMovement: Third-person follow, social space exploration, UI closeups
elements.subject: Player avatars, social interactions, customization options, virtual spaces
elements.scene: Social hubs, virtual cafes, apartments, activity zones
elements.motion: Emotes, gestures, walking, social activities, customization actions
elements.lighting: Vibrant metaverse lighting, ambient social spaces, colorful environments
elements.style: Social platform showcase - VRChat/Rec Room style

modifiedElements.scene: Virtual office spaces and conference rooms
modifiedElements.subject: Professional avatars in business settings

examples.sampleOutput: Meta Horizon Worlds, VRChat social experiences

templates.title: Ultimate Gaming Setup & Battlestation Tour
templates.description: Cinematic showcase of high-end gaming setup with RGB lighting, multiple displays, and premium peripherals

prompt.main: Darkness breaks as RGB lights activate in sequence across gaming setup. Camera slides revealing ultra-wide curved monitor displaying game menu. Mechanical keyboard keys light up in wave pattern. Close-up of high-DPI gaming mouse with customizable buttons. Pull back to show full battlestation - triple monitor array, streaming setup with professional microphone. Cable management system highlighted with subtle lighting. VR headset on custom stand, collectible figures on shelves. Gaming chair hydraulics adjusting to perfect position. Quick montage of peripheral details - headset, controller charging dock, ambient lighting synced to gameplay.

elements.cameraMovement: Smooth sliders, product-style reveals, detail macros, wide establishing
elements.subject: Gaming peripherals, PC components, RGB lighting, cable management
elements.scene: Modern gaming room, organized desk setup, ambient atmosphere
elements.motion: RGB animations, fan spinning, cable management reveals
elements.lighting: RGB synchronization, monitor glow, ambient backlighting

bestPractices: Feature both wide shots and close details

examples.sampleOutput: Setup tour videos, PC build reveals
